title: Flatten Workspace‚ÜíSpace‚ÜíSection‚ÜíTab‚ÜíPane to Workspace‚ÜíSession
context: ADR 0001 built tian around a 4-level hierarchy Workspace ‚Üí Space ‚Üí Section (Terminal | Claude) ‚Üí Tab ‚Üí Pane. In the Claude-driven workflow that actually emerged, the sidebar is a list of Claude sessions (name + branch + git diff), and the Space/Section/Tab layers added navigation cost ‚Äî tab bars, section toolbars, per-section tab lists, Cmd+Shift navigation ‚Äî without earning their keep: a 'Space' was almost always exactly one Claude session plus a scratch shell. The v6 empty-Claude state also tripped a latent restore-validation bug (FR-25). This revises the hierarchy portion of ADR 0001; the rest of 0001 (macOS/Ghostty/agent-native, sidebar status monitor, CLI, worktree-backed sessions, DMG/Sparkle) still holds, so it is named here rather than formally superseded.
decision: Collapse the hierarchy to two levels: Workspace ‚Üí Session. A Session is exactly one Claude pane (never splittable) plus a toggleable, splittable terminal panel (Ctrl+`, dock right/bottom, draggable divider). No Spaces, no Sections, no Tabs, no tab bars. Make it a CLEAN BREAK ‚Äî no compatibility aliases: the `space`/`tab` CLI groups become `session` (plus `pane list --session <id> --kind claude|terminal` to address a session's Claude pane), IPC bumps to protocol v2, `TIAN_SESSION_ID` replaces `TIAN_SPACE_ID` + `TIAN_TAB_ID`, and persistence migrates state.json v6‚Üív7 (each Claude tab becomes a session). Splits are terminal-only; the Claude pane rejects `pane split` ("Claude pane cannot be split.").
consequences: The sidebar becomes a flat/nested list of Claude sessions with branch + diff rows; navigation drops to ‚áß‚åò‚Üê/‚Üí (prev/next session), ‚åò1‚Äì9 (Nth session), ‚åÉ` (toggle terminal panel), ‚åò'/‚áß‚åò` (cycle focus area) ‚Äî the tab shortcuts are gone and ‚åòT falls through to the shell. A large view/model surface is deleted (SpaceModel/SectionModel/TabModel, tab bars, section toolbars, SpaceLevelSplitNavigation) in favor of Session/SessionCollection + a terminal-only split tree. The clean break means old CLI verbs, the TIAN_SPACE/TAB env vars, and IPC v1 clients stop working, and SKILL.md / implement.sh / hooks change in lockstep (the /tian implement harness bumps to workflow v1.2.0: worktree create returns session_id/claude_pane_id/terminal_pane_id, run-log field space_id‚Üísession_id, claude_tab_id dropped, the Claude pane is tracked via `pane list --session <id> --kind claude`). Restore no longer requires a live Claude pane, fixing the v6 empty-Claude validation bug. Forecloses multi-tab Spaces and per-space section grouping; a workflow that genuinely needs several peer terminals now uses splits within the one terminal panel.
staysTrue: ADR 0001's core bet is unchanged: an agent-native, Ghostty-embedded, macOS-only terminal built to drive Claude Code, with an IPC-scriptable CLI, a sidebar Claude status monitor, and git-worktree-backed sessions. ADR 0002 still holds ‚Äî the `tian` binary stays control/monitor primitives and orchestration lives in the skill; worktree create still delegates to the session's own Claude pane, and the anti-freelance rule is unchanged. Ghostty still owns the terminal core.
